results.question: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    d."Fiscal Year" AS Fiscal_Year,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
    SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS total_cost,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
    (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100 AS gross_margin_pct,
    COUNT(s."SalesOrderLineKey") AS total_order_lines
FROM 
    "Sales" s
JOIN 
    "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
GROUP BY 
    d."Fiscal Year"
ORDER BY 
    d."Fiscal Year" ASC;

results.question: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
results.sql:
WITH 
  -- Calculate total revenue, total orders, order lines, and gross margin for each channel
  channel_sales AS (
    SELECT 
      so."Channel",
      SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
      COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS total_orders,
      COUNT(s."SalesOrderLineKey") AS order_lines,
      AVG(s."Sales Amount") AS avg_line_amount,
      SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") / SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100 AS gross_margin_pct
    FROM 
      "Sales" s
    JOIN 
      "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
    GROUP BY 
      so."Channel"
  ),
  -- Calculate total revenue across all channels
  total_revenue AS (
    SELECT 
      SUM(total_revenue) AS grand_total
    FROM 
      channel_sales
  )
-- Calculate revenue share percentage and sort by total revenue descending
SELECT 
  "Channel",
  total_revenue,
  total_revenue / (SELECT grand_total FROM total_revenue) * 100 AS revenue_share_pct,
  total_orders,
  order_lines,
  avg_line_amount,
  gross_margin_pct
FROM 
  channel_sales
ORDER BY 
  total_revenue DESC;

results.question: Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT p.Category, SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue, SUM(s."Sales Amount") / SUM(SUM(s."Sales Amount")) OVER () * 100 AS revenue_share_pct, SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit, (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100 AS gross_margin_pct FROM Sales s INNER JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey GROUP BY p.Category ORDER BY revenue DESC

results.question: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
results.sql: SELECT p.Product, p.Category, p.Subcategory, SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue, SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit, (SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") / SUM(s."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS margin_pct FROM Sales s JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey GROUP BY p.Product, p.Category, p.Subcategory ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

results.question: Show revenue and units sold broken down by territory group, country, region, and fiscal year. Return columns: Group, Country, Region, Fiscal Year, revenue, units_sold. Sort by Group, Country, Region, then Fiscal Year all ascending.
results.sql: SELECT T1.Group, T2.Country, T2.Region, T3.Fiscal_Year, SUM(T0.Sales_Amount) AS revenue, SUM(T0.Order_Quantity) AS units_sold FROM Sales AS T0 INNER JOIN Sales_Territory AS T1 ON T0.SalesTerritoryKey = T1.SalesTerritoryKey INNER JOIN Date AS T3 ON T0.OrderDateKey = T3.DateKey INNER JOIN Sales_Territory AS T2 ON T1.SalesTerritoryKey = T2.SalesTerritoryKey GROUP BY T1.Group, T2.Country, T2.Region, T3."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY T1.Group, T2.Country, T2.Region, T3."Fiscal Year" ASC

results.question: List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.
results.sql: SELECT T1.Customer, T1.City, T1."State-Province", T1."Country-Region", COUNT(DISTINCT T2.SalesOrderLineKey) AS total_orders, COUNT(T2.SalesOrderLineKey) AS total_line_items, SUM(T2."Order Quantity") AS total_units, SUM(T2."Sales Amount") AS lifetime_revenue, SUM(T2."Sales Amount" - T2."Total Product Cost") AS lifetime_profit FROM Customer AS T1 INNER JOIN Sales AS T2 ON T1.CustomerKey = T2.CustomerKey WHERE T1.CustomerKey != -1 GROUP BY T1.Customer, T1.City, T1."State-Province", T1."Country-Region" ORDER BY lifetime_revenue DESC LIMIT 15

results.question: For the Reseller channel only, show reseller count, total revenue, revenue per reseller, gross profit, and margin percentage by business type. Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT T1."Business Type", COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ResellerKey) AS reseller_count, SUM(T3.Sales_Amount) AS total_revenue, SUM(T3.Sales_Amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ResellerKey) AS revenue_per_reseller, SUM(T3.Sales_Amount - T3.Total_Product_Cost) AS gross_profit, 100.0 * (SUM(T3.Sales_Amount - T3.Total_Product_Cost) / SUM(T3.Sales_Amount)) AS margin_pct FROM Reseller AS T1 INNER JOIN Sales AS T3 ON T1.ResellerKey = T3.ResellerKey GROUP BY T1."Business Type" ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

results.question: Show monthly revenue, number of distinct sales orders, and units sold for each month. Return columns: Month, MonthKey, monthly_revenue, orders, units_sold. Sort by MonthKey ascending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
    D.Month AS Month,
    D.MonthKey AS MonthKey,
    SUM(S.SalesAmount) AS monthly_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT SO.SalesOrder) AS orders,
    SUM(S.OrderQuantity) AS units_sold
FROM 
    Sales S
JOIN 
    Date D ON S.OrderDateKey = D.DateKey
JOIN 
    Sales_Order SO ON S.SalesOrderLineKey = SO.SalesOrderLineKey
GROUP BY 
    D.Month, D.MonthKey
ORDER BY 
    D.MonthKey ASC;
results.error:
Query failed after 2 retries: Binder Error: Values list "S" does not have a column named "SalesAmount"

LINE 4:     SUM(S.SalesAmount) AS monthly_revenue,
                ^

results.question: Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
  p."Subcategory",
  COUNT(s."SalesOrderLineKey") AS order_lines,
  SUM(s."Extended Amount") AS revenue,
  SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
  SUM(s."Extended Amount") / SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit,
  AVG(p."List Price") AS avg_list_price,
  SUM(s."Extended Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
  (SUM(s."Extended Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(s."Extended Amount") * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM 
  "Sales" s
JOIN 
  "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
GROUP BY 
  p."Subcategory"
ORDER BY 
  revenue DESC;

results.question: Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.
results.sql: WITH Revenue AS ( SELECT so.Channel, p.Category, d."Fiscal Year", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS Revenue FROM Sales s JOIN Date d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey" JOIN Product p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey" JOIN Sales_Order so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey" GROUP BY so.Channel, p.Category, d."Fiscal Year" ), RevenueRanked AS ( SELECT Channel, Category, "Fiscal Year", Revenue, LAG("Fiscal Year") OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY "Fiscal Year") AS prior_year, LAG(Revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY Channel, Category ORDER BY "Fiscal Year") AS prior_revenue FROM Revenue ), Growth AS ( SELECT Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, "Fiscal Year" AS current_year, Revenue AS current_revenue, CASE WHEN prior_revenue IS NOT NULL AND prior_revenue != 0 THEN ((Revenue - prior_revenue) / prior_revenue) * 100 ELSE NULL END AS yoy_growth_pct FROM RevenueRanked ) SELECT Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct FROM Growth ORDER BY Channel, Category, prior_year ASC;

results.question: Show the number of products, average list price, minimum list price, and maximum list price for each product category. Return columns: Category, product_count, avg_list_price, min_list_price, max_list_price. Sort by product_count descending.
results.sql: SELECT Category, COUNT(ProductKey) AS product_count, AVG("List Price") AS avg_list_price, MIN("List Price") AS min_list_price, MAX("List Price") AS max_list_price FROM Product GROUP BY Category ORDER BY product_count DESC

results.question: List all distinct product categories. Return columns: Category. Sort by Category ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT Category FROM Product ORDER BY Category ASC

results.question: List all distinct product colors. Return columns: Color. Sort by Color ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT Color FROM Product ORDER BY Color ASC

results.question: List all sales territory regions and their countries. Return columns: Region, Country. Sort by Region ascending.
results.sql: SELECT Region, Country FROM "Sales_Territory" ORDER BY Region ASC

results.question: List all distinct fiscal years. Return columns: Fiscal Year. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Fiscal Year" FROM Date ORDER BY "Fiscal Year" ASC

results.question: List all distinct sales channels. Return columns: Channel. Sort by Channel ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT Channel FROM "Sales_Order" ORDER BY Channel ASC

results.question: List all distinct customer countries. Return columns: Country-Region. Sort by Country-Region ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Country-Region" FROM Customer ORDER BY "Country-Region" ASC

results.question: List all distinct reseller business types. Return columns: Business Type. Sort by Business Type ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Business Type" FROM Reseller ORDER BY "Business Type" ASC

results.question: List all distinct fiscal quarters. Return columns: Fiscal Quarter. Sort by Fiscal Quarter ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Fiscal Quarter" FROM Date ORDER BY "Fiscal Quarter" ASC

results.question: Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.
results.sql:
SELECT 
  so.Channel,
  p.Category,
  SUM(s.Sales_Amount) AS total_revenue,
  SUM(s.Order_Quantity) AS units_sold,
  SUM(s.Sales_Amount) / SUM(s.Order_Quantity) AS revenue_per_unit,
  AVG(p.List_Price) AS avg_list_price,
  1 - (SUM(s.Unit_Price * s.Order_Quantity) / (SUM(p.List_Price * s.Order_Quantity))) AS realized_discount_pct,
  SUM(s.Sales_Amount) - SUM(p.Product_Standard_Cost * s.Order_Quantity) AS gross_profit,
  (SUM(s.Sales_Amount) - SUM(p.Product_Standard_Cost * s.Order_Quantity)) / SUM(s.Sales_Amount) AS margin_pct
FROM 
  Sales s
JOIN 
  Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
JOIN 
  Sales_Order so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey
GROUP BY 
  so.Channel, p.Category
ORDER BY 
  so.Channel ASC, total_revenue DESC;
results.error:
Query failed after 2 retries: Binder Error: Values list "s" does not have a column named "Sales_Amount"

LINE 4:   SUM(s.Sales_Amount) AS total_revenue,
              ^

results.question: Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.
results.sql: WITH   Revenue AS (     SELECT       so."Channel",      p."Category",      d."Fiscal Quarter",      SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue     FROM       "Sales" s      JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"      JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"      JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"     GROUP BY       so."Channel",      p."Category",      d."Fiscal Quarter"   ),   Revenue_with_lag AS (     SELECT       "Channel",      "Category",      "Fiscal Quarter",      revenue,      LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY "Channel", "Category" ORDER BY "Fiscal Quarter") AS prior_revenue,      LAG("Fiscal Quarter") OVER (PARTITION BY "Channel", "Category" ORDER BY "Fiscal Quarter") AS prior_quarter     FROM       Revenue   ),   Quarterly_Growth AS (     SELECT       "Channel",      "Category",      prior_quarter,      prior_revenue,      "Fiscal Quarter" AS current_quarter,      revenue AS current_revenue,      CASE         WHEN prior_revenue = 0 THEN NULL          ELSE ((revenue - prior_revenue) / prior_revenue) * 100       END AS qoq_growth_pct     FROM       Revenue_with_lag   ) SELECT   "Channel",   "Category",   prior_quarter,   prior_revenue,   current_quarter,   current_revenue,   qoq_growth_pct FROM   Quarterly_Growth ORDER BY   "Channel" ASC,   "Category" ASC,   prior_quarter ASC;
results.error: No tool call in response after 3 attempts

results.question: For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. Return columns: Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, category_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Category, revenue_rank, then Subcategory all ascending.
results.sql:
WITH 
  -- Calculate revenue, units sold, and gross profit for each subcategory
  subcategory_metrics AS (
    SELECT 
      P.Category,
      P.Subcategory,
      SUM(S.Sales_Amount) AS revenue,
      SUM(S.Order_Quantity) AS units_sold,
      SUM(S.Sales_Amount - S.Total_Product_Cost) AS gross_profit
    FROM 
      Sales S
    JOIN 
      Product P ON S.ProductKey = P.ProductKey
    GROUP BY 
      P.Category, P.Subcategory
  ),
  
  -- Calculate total revenue for each category
  category_revenue AS (
    SELECT 
      Category, 
      SUM(revenue) AS category_revenue
    FROM 
      subcategory_metrics
    GROUP BY 
      Category
  ),
  
  -- Rank subcategories by revenue within each category
  ranked_subcategories AS (
    SELECT 
      SM.Category,
      SM.Subcategory,
      SM.revenue,
      SM.units_sold,
      SM.gross_profit,
      CR.category_revenue,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SM.Category ORDER BY SM.revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank
    FROM 
      subcategory_metrics SM
    JOIN 
      category_revenue CR ON SM.Category = CR.Category
  )

-- Calculate revenue share percentage for each subcategory
SELECT 
  Category,
  revenue_rank,
  Subcategory,
  revenue,
  units_sold,
  gross_profit,
  ROUND(revenue / category_revenue * 100, 2) AS category_revenue_share_pct
FROM 
  ranked_subcategories
WHERE 
  revenue_rank <= 2
ORDER BY 
  Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory;

                  ^

results.question: Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.
results.sql: WITH   -- Calculate revenue, gross profit, and number of orders by channel and category   ChannelCategoryData AS (     SELECT       so.Channel,      p.Category,      SUM(s.SalesAmount) AS revenue,      COUNT(DISTINCT so.SalesOrderLine) AS orders,      SUM(s.SalesAmount - s.TotalProductCost) AS gross_profit     FROM       Sales s     JOIN       Sales_Order so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey     JOIN       Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey     GROUP BY       so.Channel, p.Category   ),     -- Calculate total revenue by channel   ChannelTotalRevenue AS (     SELECT       Channel,        SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue     FROM       ChannelCategoryData     GROUP BY       Channel   ),     -- Calculate detailed metrics including revenue share and cumulative share   DetailedMetrics AS (     SELECT       ccd.Channel,      ccd.Category,      ccd.revenue,      (ccd.revenue / ctr.total_revenue) * 100 AS channel_revenue_share_pct,      SUM(ccd.revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY ccd.Channel ORDER BY ccd.revenue DESC) / ctr.total_revenue * 100 AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct,      ccd.orders,      ccd.gross_profit     FROM       ChannelCategoryData ccd     JOIN       ChannelTotalRevenue ctr ON ccd.Channel = ctr.Channel   )   SELECT     Channel,    Category,    revenue,    channel_revenue_share_pct,    cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct,    orders,    gross_profit   FROM     DetailedMetrics   ORDER BY     Channel ASC,     revenue DESC,     Category ASC
results.error: Query failed after 2 retries: Parser Error: syntax error at end of input

results.question: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql: WITH group_year_revenue AS (SELECT T."Group", D."Fiscal Year", SUM(S."Sales Amount") AS group_year_revenue FROM "Sales_Territory" T JOIN "Sales" S ON T."SalesTerritoryKey" = S."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN "Date" D ON S."OrderDateKey" = D."DateKey" GROUP BY T."Group", D."Fiscal Year"), channel_revenue AS (SELECT T."Group", D."Fiscal Year", SO."Channel", SUM(S."Sales Amount") AS channel_revenue, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T."Group", D."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY SUM(S."Sales Amount") DESC) AS row_num FROM "Sales_Territory" T JOIN "Sales" S ON T."SalesTerritoryKey" = S."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN "Date" D ON S."OrderDateKey" = D."DateKey" JOIN "Sales_Order" SO ON S."SalesOrderLineKey" = SO."SalesOrderLineKey" GROUP BY T."Group", D."Fiscal Year", SO."Channel"), channel_revenue_with_group_year AS (SELECT C."Group", C."Fiscal Year", C."Channel" AS top_channel, C.channel_revenue, GYR.group_year_revenue, (C.channel_revenue / GYR.group_year_revenue) * 100 AS channel_revenue_share_pct FROM channel_revenue C JOIN group_year_revenue GYR ON C."Group" = GYR."Group" AND C."Fiscal Year" = GYR."Fiscal Year" WHERE C.row_num = 1) SELECT "Group", "Fiscal Year", top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct FROM channel_revenue_with_group_year ORDER BY "Group", "Fiscal Year" ASC;
